description: Tim Roughgarden introduces a lecture series on blockchain foundations, outlining the course structure and intended audience. He emphasizes the focus on blockchain science and technology, avoiding hype and investment discussions.
topic_summary: The series aims to explore blockchain protocols, their applications, and fundamental principles, while equipping viewers with tools to evaluate existing technologies and understand trade-offs in consensus solutions. Roughgarden encourages viewers to engage deeply with the material and acknowledges the emerging significance of blockchain in computer science.
